basis.name: Apple App Store screenshot specifications
basis.requirement: Prepare store-accurate PNG/JPG screenshots for required iPhone and iPad display families.

basis.name: Apple App Privacy Details
basis.requirement: Declare app and third-party code data collection practices before submission.

basis.name: Google Play Data safety
basis.requirement: Complete a clear and accurate Data safety section for every app.

basis.name: Google Play account deletion requirements
basis.requirement: Apps with account creation must disclose account deletion support and provide a functional web deletion link.

basis.name: Capacitor documentation
basis.requirement: Use Capacitor as the native container path for iOS and Android packaging.

basis.name: MIIT app filing notice
basis.requirement: Prepare operator, domain, ICP filing, and APP filing materials for China distribution.

milestones.title: Public HTTPS web base
milestones.objective: Choose and deploy the public HTTPS domain used by PWA, support, privacy, terms, AI disclosure, and account deletion pages.
evidence: PUBLIC_APP_ORIGIN is set to https://www.zkraiflow.top
supportUrl, marketingUrl, privacyPolicyUrl, and accountDeletionUrl no longer use TODO placeholders
All public legal pages load without authentication
Root, support, privacy, terms, AI disclosure, account deletion, and /api/healthz returned HTTP 200 on 2026-06-09
Unauthenticated cloud smoke against https://www.zkraiflow.top passed 8 checks and 0 failures on 2026-06-09
deploy/production-auth-cors-handoff.json tracks the remaining authenticated smoke, CORS, and cookie gates
nextActions: Set PUBLIC_APP_ORIGIN=https://www.zkraiflow.top in the production runtime
Set CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS=https://www.zkraiflow.top,capacitor://localhost,https://localhost in the production runtime
Run npm run production:auth-plan before production smoke verification
Run authenticated npm run cloud:smoke with SMOKE_BASE_URL=https://www.zkraiflow.top and a review-safe account

milestones.title: Store contact and support channel
milestones.objective: Provide review-safe support contact details for store listings and user support.
inputs: Support phone or business contact number
evidence: contactEmail is a real monitored email address
contactPhone is filled with a reachable support or business contact
public/support.html mirrors the chosen support channel
nextActions: Create or choose support inbox
Confirm phone/contact policy
Update public support page and store/submission-readiness.json

milestones.title: Privacy labels and data safety forms

inputs: Whether analytics, ads, or tracking are added
evidence: privacy.applePrivacyNutritionLabel.status is ready
privacy.googleDataSafety.status is ready
privacy.dataSafetyDraftFile points to a checked data-flow mapping
privacy.formFillChecklistFile points to a checked operator-facing fill checklist
Legal pages no longer contain pre-release wording
Third-party SDK review statuses are ok or documented
nextActions: Review server routes and local storage usage
Use store/privacy-data-safety-draft.json as the Apple and Google form-filling checklist
Use store/privacy-form-fill-checklist.md as the non-technical submission checklist
Confirm no analytics/ads SDK is added without disclosure
Finalize privacy.html, ai-disclosure.html, and Data safety answers

milestones.title: Review demo account and notes
milestones.objective: Prepare a stable reviewer path that demonstrates mobile creation, assets/results, settings, legal pages, and account deletion request.
inputs: Review instructions for dry-run video generation
evidence: review.demoAccountStatus is ready
review.reviewNotesStatus is ready
review.demoSeedDataStatus is script-ready or ready
review.reviewNotesFile points to a checked review-notes template
npm run review:seed:dry passes before release check
Reviewer can open home, create, assets, stitch, settings, support, and deletion pages without private local paths
nextActions: Fill the review notes template with the selected release contact and demo account details
Create a review-safe account or local auth bypass for review environment
Run npm run review:seed against the review environment to seed non-private demo product, account asset, and dry-run batch
Write App Store and Google Play review notes

milestones.title: Store listing copy and preview messaging
milestones.objective: Finalize user-facing store names, subtitles, descriptions, screenshot captions, feature graphic direction, and copy guardrails before native screenshot production.
inputs: Final app name and Chinese market name
Final feature set for first release
Final privacy and AI disclosure wording
evidence: app.storeListingCopyStatus is ready
app.storeListingCopyFile points to a checked listing copy draft
Apple and Google copy length limits are satisfied
Screenshot captions map to required screenshot scenes
Feature graphic brief uses the required 1024x500 size
Copy avoids ranking, install CTA, price, and guarantee claims
nextActions: Choose the final app name for each launch locale
Review Chinese and English descriptions against the final feature set
Use screenshot captions before native screenshot capture
Hand the feature graphic brief to design after final app name is chosen

milestones.title: App Store / Google Play console submission
milestones.objective: Map current app artifacts to the exact store console fields and keep submission blocked until owner inputs, legal finalization, review access, native builds, screenshots, and console-only questionnaires are complete.
inputs: Age rating, content rating, export compliance, target audience, ads, pricing, and availability answers
evidence: npm run store:console-plan passes
store/submission-readiness.json links the console submission handoff
App Store Connect and Google Play Console destinations are mapped
Every console section lists source files, current evidence, and open inputs
Release blockers reference store/store-console-submission-handoff.json
No passwords, signing keys, private console screenshots, or unredacted logs are stored in the repository
nextActions: Confirm final App Store and Google Play names with the owner.
Create or confirm App Store Connect and Google Play Console app records.
Fill console-only questionnaires for age rating, content rating, export compliance, target audience, ads, pricing, and availability.
Use the handoff file as the source map when uploading native builds, screenshots, privacy answers, and review access instructions.

milestones.title: Native iOS and Android packaging
milestones.objective: Install Capacitor packages, generate native projects, sync the built web app, and validate device behavior.
blocks: iOS native project is not present
Android native project is not present
inputs: Final app icon and splash assets
evidence: @capacitor/core, @capacitor/cli, @capacitor/ios, and @capacitor/android are installed
ios/App/App/Info.plist exists
android/app/build.gradle exists
Android android:allowBackup is false
Android manifest does not enable cleartext traffic
iOS Info.plist does not declare broad ATS exceptions
capacitor:check warnings for missing native projects are resolved
nextActions: Install Android SDK and configure ANDROID_HOME or ANDROID_SDK_ROOT
Switch Android build environment to JDK 17 or newer
Open Android project and verify Gradle build with the selected JDK/Android SDK
Open iOS project on macOS and verify Xcode signing/build settings
Validate safe areas, file picker, downloads, support links, and account deletion on real devices
